notes: The response is a comprehensive solution-design document (requirements, data model, API endpoints, enforcement logic) rather than a discovery artefact — it includes enriched insights in launch scope without deferral, contains no named personas with cost/timing, has no out-of-scope section, no measurable success indicators, and critically treats enriched insights as in-scope from day one rather than flagging the derived-data consent boundary as a blocking assumption, violating the MVP bounding rule categorically.
